ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "about" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  "learning_style" TEXT /* User's preferred learning style (e.g., visual, auditory, kinesthetic) */,
  "learning_goals" TEXT /* User's learning goals or objectives */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cards" (
  "card_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each learning card */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the card */,
  "card_content" TEXT /* Content of the learning card */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date and time the card was created */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the card was last reviewed */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the card is scheduled for the next review */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the card (e.g., text, image, audio) */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the card (1-5) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the card */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category or topic of the card */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Subcategory or subtopic of the card */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the card (if applicable) */,
  "audio_url" TEXT /* URL of an audio file associated with the card (if applicable) */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video associated with the card (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_card_type FOREIGN KEY ("card_type") REFERENCES card_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review session */,
  "card_id" TEXT /* ID of the learning card being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the card */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review session took place */,
  "last_interval" REAL /* Interval in days since the last review */,
  "next_interval" REAL /* Interval in days until the next review */,
  "ease" INTEGER /* Ease of recall (1-4) */,
  "delay" REAL /* Delay in starting the review session */,
  "last_factor" REAL /* Last factor used in the scheduling algorithm */,
  "next_factor" REAL /* Next factor to be used in the scheduling algorithm */,
  "reps" INTEGER /* Number of times the card has been reviewed */,
  "thinking_time" REAL /* Time spent thinking about the card */,
  "yes_count" INTEGER /* Number of correct attempts */,
  "no_count" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect attempts */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments made by the user during the review session */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the card (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_time" REAL /* Total time spent reviewing the card */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the card type (e.g., text, image, audio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the card type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the card type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "card_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each card share */,
  "card_id" TEXT /* ID of the learning card being shared */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the card */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the card */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date and time the card was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the share (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "share_message" TEXT /* Message or note sent with the shared card */,
  "share_status_date" TEXT /* Date and time the share status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_shares_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_shares_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_card_shares_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educator_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the assignment */,
  "educator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the educator assigning the material */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being assigned the material */,
  "card_id" TEXT /* ID of the learning card being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the material was assigned */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date and time the material is due for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_assignments_educator_id FOREIGN KEY ("educator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educator_assignments_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_tracking" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the progress track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being tracked */,
  "card_id" TEXT /* ID of the learning card being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date and time the progress was updated */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's progress (e.g., in progress, completed, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_tracking_card_id FOREIGN KEY ("card_id") REFERENCES cards ("card_id")
)
